text: Kicking off the WBP working group Slack. Weekly summaries here on Fridays.
Neonatal outcomes gap flagged. Adding EL-0072 and EL-0089 to the evidence log.
R1 protocol posted to Confluence. Please read before Wed.
Support held-open on neonatal outcomes beyond 28d. EL-0091 and EL-0141 too thin.
Two parameter changes proposed. Water temp 36.8-37.5 C, primip escalation 90 min.
R2 draft targeted for 16 Oct. Comments open on the Confluence page.
Ward chat: Ingrid picking up comms workstream. Updating trackers.
Pool B biomed sign-off received. Moving from amber to conditional-ready.
Submission dossier PDF assembled. HELD for sign-off. Filing HELD DRAFT. Pre-briefing PDF to Dr. Olsson circulated.
Adding EL-0072 EL-0074 EL-0079 EL-0082. Weights A B C B.
EL-0089 confirms no early-onset infection difference with exclusion criteria applied.
EL-0091 and EL-0141 both partial_held_open. Long-horizon follow-up limited by sample size.
EL-0117 and EL-0121 replicate the narrower temperature range benefit. Both A weight.
EL-0134 pooled analysis confirms narrower range benefit. Cited in R2.
Reconciliation log: 2018 hospital guideline citation for water temp overridden by EL-0117.
R2 delta: water temp 36.0-37.5 -> 36.8-37.5. Second-stage primip 60 -> 90 min.
Escalation pathway unchanged. Postpartum handover unchanged.
Amber Pool B remains. Note in protocol appendix.
R2 posted to Confluence. Parameter change log tied to EL rows.
HELD DRAFT watermark applied to formal filing.
INC-2026-04412 opened: Pool A recirculation motor PM.
Cohort A 12, Cohort B 14, Cohort C 12. Rollout Jan 12 - Mar 30 2027.
Module sequence: physiology recap, param delta, monitoring cadence, escalation, handover, sign-off.
Backfill strategy sketched. Conservative 340 hours, stretched 470 hours.
Competency sign-off co-owner Malin Eriksson confirmed.
12 risks tracked. 2 evidence risks status open.
Amber Pool B added to risk register. Owner Erik. Mitigation biomed sign-off before 27 Nov.
Roster of 12 pairings locked. Pilot IDs P-01 to P-12.
Pilot pairing check-in: P-04 mentor availability thin.
P-11 feedback theme too much protocol recall not enough reflection.
Two adjustments to align on with Malin before Fri 18 Dec.
P-11 rating 3. Flag for review. Balance protocol recall vs reflection.
P-01 P-05 P-08 P-12 rating 5. Reflective practice working. Changeover window valued.
